text: Defect reports will be available to technical units on a 24x7 basis.
The application should be connected to the Internet.
The system shall be available for use between the hours of 8am and 6pm.
The product shall allow the user to view previously downloaded search results CMA reports and appointments.
The website shall continue to operate if the streaming server goes down.
The client should agree to EULA before using our software.

The product must comply with the intranet page standards and requirements of ENET Securities. 95% of the product look & feel will be approved by the Architecture group prior to implementation. The remaining 5% will be corrected and approved within one month of product release.
The product shall comply with corporate User Interface Guidelines
The product shall simulate the look of ships at sea.
The system should be simple to use
The user interface shall have standard menus buttons for navigation
All changes updates and additions to the WCS system shall be updated in the WCS Developer and WCS User Guides. Every change must be reflected in WCS system documentation
Application updates shall occur between 3AM and 6 AM CST on Wednesday morning during the middle of the NFL season.
Test environments should be built for the application to allow testing of the applications different functions.
A primary database will be used to store cached data for active users.
It must only update the parts that have changed when connecting to the server.
The product is expected to integrate with multiple database management systems. The product will operate with Oracle SQL Server DB2 MySQL HSQL and MS Access.
The product must support Mozilla Firefox 1.0 and above.
The same hardware supporting the current website will be used to support the new system.
The system shall able to operate within a business office environment typical of the Nursing Department at DePaul University.
The system shall utilise periodic 30-second keep-alive messages between tablets and the server to monitor tablet operational status.
System shall let administrator de-activate a customer account in under 1 minute. Customer will no longer be able to access the website.
The preferred repair facility ratings shall be saved within 5 seconds. The save shall occur within 5 seconds.
The process must fit within the processing time conditions set forth by the Auto Rep Assignment process in which a lead is assigned within 3 minutes of the total life cycle.
The product shall poll the system for messages every second.The product shall poll the system for new messages at a maximum of every 1 second.
The product shall respond fast to keep up-to-date data in the display.
The response shall be fast enough to avoid interrupting the user92s flow of thought. 90% of tasks shall complete within 5 seconds. 98% of tasks shall complete within 8 seconds.
The response time shall be fast enough to maintain the flow of the game. The response time shall be no more than 2 seconds for 95% of responses and no more than 4% for the remaining responses.
The system should be portable to various operating environments.
The average number of recycled parts records per day shall be 50 000.
The system shall be capable of processing 100% of nursing students and their classes for the next 10 years.
A tablet shall require a user to log in using a username and password.
Data integrity scripts will be run on a weekly basis to verify the integrity of the database.
Dr Susan Poslusny and Dr Julie Donalek are the only people who shall have access to students92 personal information.
Each user shall either be trusted or not trusted.
Information transmission should be securely transmitted to server without any changes in information.
Logout must be automatic after 1 hour of inactivity.
Only registered realtors shall be able to access the system.
The Disputes application shall ensure that only users with the appropriate access level are allowed to initiate dispute requests.

The product shall ensure that only company employees or external users with company-approved user IDs may have product access. 100% of all logons shall be by either company employees or external users with company-approved user IDs.
The product shall ensure that only supervisors can view schedule of all callers.The product must ensure that supervisors are allowed to access advertise empty time slots.
The system shall not leave any cookies on the customer’s computer containing the user’s password.
The system shall notify customers of changes to its information policy.
The system shall prevent malicious attacks including denial of service.
A new user shall be able to navigate through the league and team pages within 30 seconds of reaching the start-up page.
All CCR users shall receive training before the WCS system is deployed. One training session will be held for 100% of CCR users before system deployment (based on a CCR user being available)

The product shall be easy for customers with novice skills on the Internet to purchase and watch streaming movies. Customers should be able to purchase and watch a pre-determined movie in under 3 minutes.
The product shall provide Error Tracking Services.The product shall help the System Administrators and DBAs to resolve transaction errors 99% of the time.
The product shall provide Monitoring Services.The product shall be easy for System Administrators and DBAs to use after two weeks of usage.
The product shall retain the customer92s buying preferences and information.
The system must be quickly accessible by both managers and chefs.
The system shall provide handicap access.
